description: The synthetic-data generation experiments that produce data_synth/. Default reproduction uses the committed batches; rerun via reproduce_synth.py only when investigating prompt/model variation. Each step requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY in the environment.

steps.description: ST1/ST2 contrastive-pair batch (130 pairs across the eight ST2 fallacy types). Backs §3.4 of the paper.
pe-targeted batch (50 per label, openai/gpt-4o-mini, T=0.9). Backs Appendix A Prompt 3.

pseudo_labels.description: Pseudo-labelling does not use an LLM API. The shared/pseudo_label.py CLI takes a trained checkpoint and emits top-K confident predictions on the unlabelled pool. The committed pseudo_v001_st{1,2,3} batches were produced from the leak-audited exp_0081 checkpoint at tau=0.9.
